headline: Hershey (HSY) Valuation Check As Pokémon Collaboration Puts Growth Expectations In Focus
summary: Hershey (HSY) is back in the spotlight after unveiling a limited-time collaboration with The Pokémon Company International and Pirate's Booty, centered on collectible Hershey's Kisses, digital experiences and Pokémon themed snack products. See our latest analysis for Hershey. At a share price of US$190.39, Hershey has seen short term share price returns soften, with the 90 day share price return down 14.15%. Even so, the 1 year total shareholder return is 27.45%. This suggests the recent...
